2606.12087.title: FORT-Searcher: Synthesizing Shortcut-Resistant Search Tasks for Training Deep Search Agents
2606.12087.paper_summary: Training deep search agents requires verifiable questions whose answers remain unavailable until sufficient evidence has been acquired through search. Existing synthesis methods often increase apparent difficulty by enriching graph structures, but structural complexity alone does not guarantee realized search difficulty: the intended search process can collapse through a cheaper identifying route. We formalize this gap with a shortcut-aware difficulty framework and identify four actionable shortcut risks: evidence co-coverage, single-clue selectivity, exposed constants, and prior-knowledge binding. To diagnose their realized effects, we use trajectory signatures including solving cost, answer hit time, and prior-shortcut rate. Guided by this framework, we introduce FORT, a Framework of Shortcut-Resistant Training-Data Synthesis. FORT constructs shortcut-resistant training data by controlling shortcut risks across entity selection, evidence graph construction, question formulation, and adversarial refinement. Experiments show that FORT induces longer pre-answer search and fewer shortcut patterns than existing open-source deep search datasets. Using the resulting trajectories, we train FORT-Searcher with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) only, and it achieves the best overall performance among comparable-size open-source search agents on challenging deep search benchmarks. Relevant resources will be made available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/FORT-Searcher.
2606.12087.paper_summary_zh: 訓練深度搜尋代理需要可驗證的問題，其答案在通過搜尋獲得足夠證據之前無法獲得。現有的綜合方法通常通過豐富圖形結構來增加表面難度，但僅僅依賴結構複雜性並不能保證實際的搜尋難度：預期的搜尋過程可能會通過更便宜的識別路徑崩潰。我們用一個考慮捷徑的難度框架來形式化這一差距，並確定四個可行的捷徑風險：證據共同覆蓋、單一線索選擇性、暴露常數和先驗知識綁定。為了診斷它們的實際影響，我們使用軌跡簽名，包括解決成本、答案命中時間和先前捷徑比率。在這一框架的指導下，我們引入了FORT，一個捷徑抗性訓練數據合成框架。FORT通過控制實體選擇、證據圖構建、問題表述和對抗性精煉中的捷徑風險來構建捷徑抗性的訓練數據。實驗表明，FORT引導的預答案搜尋時間更長，且捷徑模式比現有的開源深度搜尋數據集更少。利用這些結果軌跡，我們僅使用監督微調（SFT）訓練FORT-Searcher，並在具有挑戰性的深度搜尋基準上實現了與相似規模的開源搜尋代理相比最佳的整體性能。相關資源將在 https://github.com/RUCAIBox/FORT-Searcher 上提供。
2606.12087.author: Jia Deng et.al.
2606.12087.authors: Jia Deng, Yimeng Chen, Xiaoqing Xiang, Ziyang Zeng, Shuo Tang, Wayne Xin Zhao, Feng Chang, Chuan Hao, Yuan Wei, Ran Tao, Bryan Dai, Ji-Rong Wen
